entry.title: Why do we reason?
entry.content:
Why do we reason?

Theres nothing here yet! But its a nice proof of conecpt for this longer blogging format!

This could be my creative writing era! This is so exciting. Imagine yapping pages about some random topic to the silly little people in my puter. Im very hyped. Much excited.

struct Cute {
    const char* role;
    short age;
    const char* studying[1];
    const char* interests[3];
    const char* loves[1];
};

int main() {
    struct Cute = {
        .role = "CS Student working for the police of Berlin 🕵️",
        .age = 21,
        .studying = {"Computer Science"},
        .interests = {"Kittens", "Programming", "Friends"},
        .loves = {"Kitties!!!"}
    };

    return ❤️;
}

Test1
